scripts.build:dist: npm run build && rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/custom_components/google_assistant_manual && cp __init__.py config_flow.py const.py frontend.py frontend.js manifest.json strings.json hacs.json build/custom_components/google_assistant_manual/ && cp -r assets translations build/custom_components/google_assistant_manual/
scripts.lint: eslint frontend.ts && ruff check . && ruff format --check .
scripts.fix: eslint --fix frontend.ts && ruff check --fix . && ruff format .
